parameters.text:
={{"Extract grounded narrative facts from this family voice transcript. Do not invent details. Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with exactly these keys: title, summary, tones, themes, memory_moments, speaker_hint, audience_hint, dedication_hint.

Profile: " + JSON.stringify($json.profile) + "
Heritage Pack: " + JSON.stringify($json.heritage_pack) + "
Transcript: " + $json.transcript}}

options.systemMessage: You are a careful narrative analyst. Use only evidence in the transcript and provided profile/context. If a field is unknown, infer minimally and keep it generic.

parameters.text:
={{"Transform transcript + extracted facts into a structured story payload draft. Keep details grounded in transcript. Use only experiences: memory-cards, generated-image, recipe-scroll. Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with exactly: metadata {title,speaker,audience,tone[],language_tags[],heritage_tags[]}, throughline, dedication, beats[] where each beat has kind,theme,experience,title,content,content_origin,visual_prompt,ambient_detail.

Transcript: " + $json.transcript + "
Facts: " + JSON.stringify($json.facts) + "
Profile: " + JSON.stringify($json.profile) + "
Heritage Pack: " + JSON.stringify($json.heritage_pack)}}

options.systemMessage: You are a family-story editor. Keep the voice warm and specific, but never invent factual events not present in the transcript. Keep beats between 4 and 8.
